overview.description: The iShares S&P GSCI Commodity Indexed Trust (GSG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P GSCI index. The fund uses index futures contracts to gain exposure to a production-weighted index of front-month commodities futures contracts. GSG was launched on Jul 10, 2006 and is issued by BlackRock.
